gdp
***


Description
===========

Use Guarded Data Pipelines to facilitate data transfer between
different security domains. The service provides physical, network,
and logistical isolation between security domains, malware and
vulnerability scanning, auditing, and logging, with deep content
inspection capabilities.


Available Commands
==================

* pipeline

  * change-compartment

  * create

  * delete

  * get

  * list

  * peer

  * start

  * stop

  * update

* work-request

  * get

  * list

* work-request-error

  * list

* work-request-log-entry

  * list
